chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-149 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition as notices not issued as cost and copies not supplied by learned counsel for petitioner. 18.05.2022 Petitioner has prayed for vacating an area of 1500 sq. ft. out of 3000 sq. ft. and its handing over to her by respondents No.3, 5 & 11. Although these are official respondents but such claim and questions cannot be adjudicated in proceedings under Article 199. Earlier, on 26.01.2022 notice was ordered; however, today it is fixed for non-prosecution. In view of the above, as observed petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
